caption: The video shows a close-up view of a vehicle's digital dashboard and instrument cluster. On the left, a tachometer is visible with markings for RPM x1000, showing numbers like 3500, 4500, 5, and 6. In the center of the display, white on-screen text reads "BRAKE", followed by a red warning light and the instructions "Press Brake and Push Button to Start". Below these instructions, a small digital odometer displays "20434 mi". The scene remains static across the frames, with no people present and no movement of the needles or changes in the text. A blurry white object partially obscures the bottom right portion of the view throughout the sequence. The lighting is dim, emphasizing the red and white glow of the dashboard's electronic displays.
